subject: URGENT: Production DB is down
body: The production database cluster went unresponsive at 14:32 IST. Users are seeing 500 errors. Please jump on this immediately.

subject: Quarterly OKR review — deadline Friday
body: Reminder that the OKR self-assessment is due this Friday. Please fill in the shared Google Sheet by EOD Thursday.

subject: This week in AI: GPT-5 rumours, new open-source models
body: Welcome to your weekly roundup. 1. GPT-5 speculation. 2. Meta new model. 3. Gemini pricing.

subject: Re: Sprint planning — moved to Wednesday
body: Sprint planning has been moved from Tuesday to Wednesday 2 PM. Same Zoom link. Please update your calendars.

subject: Congratulations! You have won a $500 gift card!!!
body: CLICK HERE TO CLAIM YOUR PRIZE! You have been selected as today's lucky winner.

subject: Reminder: mandatory compliance training by May 15
body: All employees must complete the annual data-privacy compliance training by May 15. The course is on the internal LMS.

subject: Code review request: auth-service PR #312
body: Could you review my PR? Fairly contained change — swapping the JWT library. No rush, but before Wednesday sprint.

subject: Invoice #4821 — payment details
body: Please find payment details for invoice #4821. Amount: $12,500. We need this processed before end of week.
